calendar.matters: ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-16-2026 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Debbie Kinney for Doris Cheong (petitioner) (via zoom).
John Claark for Ian Cheong (via zoom).

Judge Russell Roeca disclosed to parties that he represented Debbie Kinney in the past.

The Court granted the petitioner as administrator with full IAEA and fixed full bond at $1,209,000.00. The matter is taken under submission with the intent to grant.

Judge:Russell S. Roeca. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-13-2026 Continued To Jun-16-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
